name: SheetJS (xlsx)
when_to_use: 需要在浏览器里解析 .xlsx/.xls/.ods 二进制表格并取数据或转 HTML 表(sheet_to_html)以预览时用它,而非手写 Office 二进制解析。渲染交互大表格用 ag-grid/tabulator;只解析 CSV 用 papaparse;要产出带样式的 .xlsx 成品用 exceljs。
why_valuable: AI 无法解压解析 Office 专有二进制(.xlsx=zip+OOXML,.xls=BIFF),这是「预览一个 Excel 文件」的前置解码能力;xlsx 以 read(bytes)→WorkBook + utils.sheet_to_html/sheet_to_json 把解码收敛成纯 JS 调用,产出数据或 HTML 表交由消费方渲染。

data_in.note: 诚实提示:SheetJS 已把新版迁到自有 CDN,公共 npm 冻结在 0.18.5;但 0.18.5 仍可经 jsDelivr /npm/ 加载。输入是表格文件字节,ArrayBuffer/Uint8Array 用 type:'array'。read 同步返回 WorkBook,渲染/取数走 utils。

schema.data: ArrayBuffer | Uint8Array —— 表格文件二进制(File.arrayBuffer()/fetch().arrayBuffer());配 opts.type:'array'

opts?._default: 省略时按魔数/扩展自动识别
opts?.sheetRows?: number —— 只解析前 N 行,默认 0(全部)
opts?.cellDates?: boolean —— 日期解析为 Date,默认 false

provides._note: headless-primitive:自身不渲染、无 L 级、无 carriers 矩阵;产出 WorkBook 对象,再用 utils 转 HTML 表或行数据交给消费方渲染。
provides.outputs: read(data,opts) → WorkBook { SheetNames:string[], Sheets:{[name]:WorkSheet} };utils.sheet_to_html(ws) → HTML <table> 字符串;utils.sheet_to_json(ws,{header:1}) → 二维行数组。

peer.note: 本条只解码出 WorkBook/行数据;要交互渲染大表格(排序/筛选/虚拟滚动)把 sheet_to_json 结果喂给 ag-grid/tabulator,或直接把 sheet_to_html 字符串 innerHTML 到容器(widget 落 shadow)。

boot.note: read 是同步返回。type 必须与 data 类型匹配(ArrayBuffer/Uint8Array→'array')。sheet_to_html 输出的 <table> 字符串内容来自源文件,innerHTML 前按宿主策略处理。公共 npm 版本止于 0.18.5,若需最新特性须改用 SheetJS 自有 CDN(超出本条 /npm/ 范围)。

isolation.evidence: xlsx@0.18.5 +esm exports named `read`(tn), `utils`(Hw), `write`(nn), `writeFile`(Eo), `version`, `set_cptable`, `stream` etc — import {read,utils} correct. types/index.d.ts: read(data:any, opts?:ParsingOptions):WorkBook (L25); WorkBook { SheetNames:string[], Sheets:{[s]:WorkSheet} } (L269-277); utils.sheet_to_html(worksheet, options?:Sheet2HTMLOpts):string (L795); utils.sheet_to_json(worksheet, opts?):T[]/any[][] (L784-786) — all boot symbols check out. package.json browser field stubs node builtins (fs/buffer/crypto/stream/process:false) so the +esm browser build is pure in-memory parsing. Verified footprint of /tmp bundle: 0 document.head / createElement('style') / adoptedStyleSheets / window|document.addEventListener — read/utils are pure JS returning a WorkBook object / HTML string / row arrays with zero DOM/event/style footprint → trivially shadow-safe; consumer owns rendering. Honest caveat: SheetJS moved current releases to its own CDN; public npm is frozen at 0.18.5 (still loadable via jsDelivr /npm/).

en.when_to_use: Use it to parse .xlsx/.xls/.ods spreadsheet binary in the browser and extract data or convert a sheet to an HTML table with sheet_to_html for preview, instead of implementing Office binary parsing by hand. Render large interactive tables with ag-grid/tabulator; parse CSV only with papaparse; produce a finished styled .xlsx with exceljs.
en.why_valuable: AI cannot unpack and parse proprietary Office binaries (.xlsx=zip+OOXML, .xls=BIFF). This is the prerequisite decoding layer for previewing an Excel file: xlsx reduces read(bytes) -> WorkBook plus utils.sheet_to_html/sheet_to_json to pure JS calls, producing data or an HTML table for the consumer to render.

data_in.note: Important: SheetJS moved current releases to its own CDN, and public npm is frozen at 0.18.5; version 0.18.5 still loads through jsDelivr /npm/. Input is spreadsheet-file bytes; use type:'array' for ArrayBuffer/Uint8Array. read synchronously returns a WorkBook, and rendering/extraction uses utils.

schema.data: ArrayBuffer | Uint8Array -- Spreadsheet-file binary from File.arrayBuffer()/fetch().arrayBuffer(); use opts.type:'array'

opts?._default: Infers format from magic bytes/extension when omitted
opts?.sheetRows?: number -- Parse only the first N rows; default 0 (all)
opts?.cellDates?: boolean -- Parse dates as Date; default false
